steps.label: cause
steps.text: Concrete vessels have thick walls and high thermal mass.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Their mass absorbs and releases heat slowly, buffering rapid temperature changes during fermentation.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Fermentation temperature can remain more naturally stable, although active cooling may still be required.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fermentation temperature can remain more naturally stable, although active cooling may still be required.
